message.msgTxt: '{"asOf":"2025-03-08T08:00:00Z","totalErrors":6,"systems":[{"id":"SYS-01","name":"Banner SIS","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2025-03-08T06:00:00Z","errorCount":1,"description":"Core student information system. Source of record for enrollment, grades, and academic history.","errors":[{"id":"ERR-001","type":"Sync Lag","field":"Enrollment Status","severity":"medium","message":"3 enrollment status changes from Jan 24 not yet propagated to Canvas LMS","resolution":"Trigger manual sync for affected student IDs: STU-004, STU-008, STU-011."}]},{"id":"SYS-02","name":"Oracle Student Cloud","status":"warning","lastSync":"2025-03-07T22:00:00Z","errorCount":3,"description":"Cloud-based records and degree audit. Receives enrollment and academic standing data from Banner.","errors":[{"id":"ERR-002","type":"Record Mismatch","field":"Credit Count","severity":"high","message":"STU-002 shows 105 credits in Oracle vs 98 in Banner SIS","resolution":"Verify Banner as source of truth. Rerun sync for student record STU-002."},{"id":"ERR-003","type":"Holds Not Synced","field":"Student Holds","severity":"high","message":"Financial holds for STU-004 and STU-008 not reflected in Oracle Cloud","resolution":"Trigger hold sync workflow. Check Boomi integration route for hold status field mapping."},{"id":"ERR-004","type":"Stale Graduation Status","field":"Graduation Flag","severity":"medium","message":"STU-010 graduation application not reflected in Oracle degree audit","resolution":"Manually update graduation flag in Oracle. Verify Boomi graduation workflow trigger."}]},{"id":"SYS-03","name":"Financial Aid System","status":"error","lastSync":"2025-03-06T14:00:00Z","errorCount":2,"description":"Manages aid eligibility, disbursement certification, and enrollment verification for federal reporting.","errors":[{"id":"ERR-005","type":"Certification Missing","field":"Enrollment Certification","severity":"critical","message":"7 students enrolled full-time but not certified - aid disbursement suspended","resolution":"Run enrollment certification batch. Notify Financial Aid office. Deadline was Jan 20."},{"id":"ERR-006","type":"Enrollment Mismatch","field":"Credit Hours","severity":"high","message":"STU-009 shows part-time (9 credits) in FA system but is enrolled full-time (12 credits)","resolution":"Update FA system enrollment status for STU-009. Rerun certification for this student."}]},{"id":"SYS-04","name":"Canvas LMS","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2025-03-08T04:00:00Z","errorCount":0,"description":"Learning management system. Receives course rosters from Banner via nightly enrollment sync.","errors":[]},{"id":"SYS-05","name":"Housing and Meal Plans","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2025-03-08T02:00:00Z","errorCount":0,"description":"Residential and dining system. Cross-references enrollment status for housing eligibility.","errors":[]}]}'
